clusters.label: Franchise agreement
clusters.description: This cluster contains franchise agreement documents and related sections such as the table of contents, parties, and operational obligations for a franchise relationship.

clusters.label: Offering Allocation Compliance
clusters.description: Clauses about securities offering administration, including oversubscription allocation, syndicate assistance, and compliance or approval conditions for closing and listing.

clusters.label: Mutual Fund Servicing Agreement
clusters.description: Clauses from agreements governing servicing, distribution, representations, fees, and operational obligations for mutual fund shares and related parties.

clusters.label: Contract recitals and opening
clusters.description: Introductory agreement language stating consideration and mutual covenants, typically followed by “now therefore” and the start of the contract’s operative sections.

clusters.label: Agreement Term Duration
clusters.description: Clauses specifying the effective term, commencement, expiration, renewal, and extension of an agreement or contract.

clusters.label: Force Majeure Clauses
clusters.description: Contract provisions addressing delays, suspension, or nonperformance caused by events beyond a party’s reasonable control, including notice, excuse from performance, and termination or extension rights.

clusters.label: Joint Steering Committee
clusters.description: Clauses establishing a joint steering or management committee, including its purpose, membership, decision-making process, and responsibilities for overseeing the parties’ collaboration.

clusters.label: Entire Agreement Clauses
clusters.description: Clauses stating that the contract is the complete agreement between the parties and supersedes prior negotiations, understandings, and agreements.

clusters.label: Notice and Delivery Provisions
clusters.description: Clauses specifying how formal notices and communications must be delivered, including acceptable methods, timing, and deemed receipt rules.

clusters.label: Strategic alliance terms
clusters.description: This cluster covers provisions from a strategic collaboration agreement, including governance, responsibilities, confidentiality, dispute resolution, and study order termination.

clusters.label: Joint venture formation
clusters.description: Clauses establishing a joint venture’s name, purpose, office location, capital contributions, and management authority.

clusters.label: Distributor Agreement Terms
clusters.description: This cluster covers nonexclusive distributor agreement documents and their core contract sections, including definitions, scope, appointment, exhibits, and related terms for product distribution and licensing.

clusters.label: Limitation of Liability
clusters.description: Clauses defining and limiting parties’ liability, including exclusions for consequential damages, caps on damages, and related definitions of loss or liability.

clusters.label: Wireless Content License
clusters.description: License agreements granting rights to develop, distribute, and sell wireless/mobile content based on licensed entertainment properties.

clusters.label: Software Hosting Agreement
clusters.description: Contract definitions and terms for a software license and hosting arrangement, including service, server, revenue, and user definitions.

clusters.label: Trademark License Terms
clusters.description: Clauses governing the grant, scope, use, quality control, enforcement, confidentiality, survival, and indemnification provisions of a trademark licensing agreement.

clusters.label: Signature Blocks
clusters.description: Legal document signature blocks and execution lines showing names, titles, dates, and company signatories.

clusters.label: Indemnification Clauses
clusters.description: Contract provisions requiring one party to defend, indemnify, and hold the other harmless for third-party claims, including notice, control of defense, and settlement terms.

clusters.label: Agency Services Agreement
clusters.description: Clauses about appointing a contractor or agent to provide marketing, servicing, web site, and related offering support services under an agreement.

clusters.label: Affiliate Definitions
clusters.description: Definitions of affiliate, control, and related controlled affiliate terms used to establish corporate relationship scope in legal agreements.

clusters.label: Gas Transportation Terms
clusters.description: Definitions and service provisions for a natural gas transportation agreement, including quantities, fuel/shrinkage, service type, and receipt/delivery points.

clusters.label: Consulting Agreement Terms
clusters.description: Clauses covering consultant services, compensation, independent contractor status, confidentiality, and nonsolicitation obligations in a consulting agreement.

clusters.label: Counterparts Clause
clusters.description: Contract provisions stating that the agreement may be signed in multiple counterparts, each treated as an original and together forming one binding instrument.

clusters.label: Service obligations and policies
clusters.description: This cluster covers contractual provisions on security, customer support duties, maintenance, acceptable use, and data protection/privacy obligations in service agreements.

clusters.label: Distribution and Marketing Duties
clusters.description: Clauses about a distributor’s rights and obligations to market, sell, promote, and service products within a defined territory.

clusters.description: Execution and signature block language showing parties signing an agreement, often with witness clauses and dated signatory lines.
